title: Partyhop
description: Small QOL and performance additions and fixes designed for eebySMP.
body:
Partyhop

Partyhop is designed for eebySMP. Although it will work for any SMP server, check with your server owner to verify mods used here are allowed on your server. No support will be given for non eebySMP uses.

Partyhop is a Minecraft modpack designed to make the game more enjoyable without sacrificing its core style. It includes mods that enhance the visuals and sound design and make things like building easier to use (via the use of bedrock-style building via Reacharound). Partyhop includes Optifine compatibility mods, allowing for custom textures and blocks, randomised mobs and custom items. It also has mods that improve the user experience with enhancements to audio (via ExtraSounds, Console Sounds, Presence Footsteps, and Sound Filters), plus support for Simple Voice Chat.
> Please note that Partyhop may be incompatible with larger servers such as Hypixel due to Reacharound block placement. If this is an issue, the mod can be easily disabled via the mod menu.
